# teraswitch_regions (Data Source)

Regions data source allows you to retrieve all available regions where services can be deployed.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get all regions
data "teraswitch_regions" "all" {}

# Get only regions that support Metal
data "teraswitch_regions" "metal" {
  service_type = "Metal"
}

# Output all available regions
output "available_regions" {
  value = data.teraswitch_regions.all.regions
}

# Output region IDs for easy reference
output "region_ids" {
  value = [for region in data.teraswitch_regions.all.regions : region.id]
}

# Output regions that support Metal
output "metal_regions" {
  value = data.teraswitch_regions.metal.regions
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `service_type` (String) Filter regions by service type. Valid values are: Metal, Instance, ObjectStorage, BlockStorage.

### Read-Only

- `regions` (Attributes List) List of available regions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `city` (String) The city where the region is located.
- `country` (String) The country where the region is located.
- `id` (String) The ID of the region (e.g., us-east-1).
- `location` (String) The geographic location of the region (e.g., North America, Europe).
- `name` (String) The display name of the region.
- `service_types` (List of String) List of service types available in this region.
